## **Complete ContosoUniversity Application Source Code**

### **Controllers (7 files)**

1. **BaseController.cs** - Abstract base controller with SchoolContext and NotificationService, includes SendEntityNotification methods
2. **CoursesController.cs** - CRUD operations for courses with file upload for teaching materials, notifications on create/update/delete
3. **DepartmentsController.cs** - Department management with concurrency handling and notifications
4. **HomeController.cs** - Home page, About (with enrollment statistics), Contact pages
5. **InstructorsController.cs** - Instructor management with course assignments and office assignments
6. **NotificationsController.cs** - API endpoints for retrieving notifications and marking as read
7. **StudentsController.cs** - Student CRUD with search/sort/pagination, enrollment date validation

### **Models (11 files)**

1. **Course.cs** - Course entity with title, credits, department, teaching material image path
2. **CourseAssignment.cs** - Junction table for Instructor-Course many-to-many relationship
3. **Department.cs** - Department with name, budget, start date, administrator (instructor), row version for concurrency
4. **Enrollment.cs** - Student enrollment in courses with grade (A, B, C, D, F)
5. **ErrorViewModel.cs** - Error page view model with RequestId
6. **Instructor.cs** - Extends Person, includes hire date, office assignment, course assignments
7. **Notification.cs** - Audit notifications with entity type, ID, operation, message, timestamps
8. **OfficeAssignment.cs** - One-to-one relationship with Instructor
9. **Person.cs** - Abstract base class for Student and Instructor (TPH inheritance)
10. **Student.cs** - Extends Person, includes enrollment date and enrollments collection

### **ViewModels (3 files)**

1. **AssignedCourseData.cs** - Course display data for instructor assignment
2. **EnrollmentDateGroup.cs** - Grouped enrollment statistics by date
3. **InstructorIndexData.cs** - Complex view model for instructor index with courses and enrollments

### **Data Layer (3 files)**

1. **DbInitializer.cs** - Seeds database with 8 students, 5 instructors, 4 departments, 7 courses, office assignments, and enrollments
2. **SchoolContext.cs** - DbContext with DbSets for all entities, TPH inheritance configuration, composite keys, relationships
3. **SchoolContextFactory.cs** - Factory method to create SchoolContext with connection string and retry policy

### **Services (1 file)**

1. **NotificationService.cs** - In-memory notification queue (ConcurrentQueue) with send/receive/mark-as-read functionality

All files are complete and ready for comprehensive unit testing!
